understanding.goal_understanding: Progress through KA59’s levels by arranging the selectable pieces so that every goal tile marked '+' is simultaneously occupied by a selectable piece, within the step budget; completing the final level ends the run with WIN.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The currently selected piece (shown as 'P' in the semantic grid, with its pixel [x,y] in player.position) moves in 3-pixel grid steps via MOVE_* actions, stopping when blocked by walls/boundaries or other objects. Some adjacent objects are pushable blocks: moving into them can push them one cell if space permits, letting the selected piece advance as well; otherwise the move is prevented. Levels may have multiple selectables (others shown as 'S'); control switches between them using CLICK with the exact pixel coordinates of the target selectable, enabling separate positioning to cover all '+' goals at once.
